violations.text: Shredded lettuce and cheese were observed held at 51-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were placed with ice packs and then refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The delivery door was not tight fitting. Door to be properly adjusted to prevent entryways for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The gaskets at the 2 door reach-in freezer (in 5th and 6th cafeteria) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
The delivery door was not tight fitting. Door to be properly adjusted to prevent entryways for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The gaskets at the 2 door reach-in freezer (in 5th and 6th cafeteria) and milk cooler (in 7th and 8th cafeteria) were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
The dry wall and coving near 2 door freezer were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Potato salad was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit at the salad bar. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of staff, food was prepared about 2 hours ago. PIC decided to voluntarily disposed of food for corrective action. Prepared foods must be cooled/ chilled to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to placing in salad bar. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The delivery door was not tight fitting. Door to be properly adjusted to prevent entryways for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The gaskets at the 2 door reach-in freezer and milk cooler were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
The delivery door was not tight fitting. Door to be properly adjusted to prevent entryways for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The gaskets at the 2 door reach-in freezer and milk cooler were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024

Beverage unit was observed to be at 47 degrees. No dairy or juice products shall be stored in unit till unit is reading and maintaining a tempature of 41 or below. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
the can opener blade located in 7th/8th grade kitchen was observed to be in poor repair. Blade on can opener shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
